---
title: "Learining R3"
author: "Kristina Matthiesen Hansen"
format: html
---

## Pre-Workshop

```{r setup}
#| include: false
```

This code is used for create and uploading my work to GitHub

```{r}
usethis::use_github() 
```

I will work with the nurses-stress.R data

```{r}
usethis::use_data_raw("nurses-stress")
```
